arts.ttl: Tierney will be Celtic player by summer - Rodgers
arts.sum: Brendan Rodgers confirms that Scotland defender Kieran Tierney will move to Celtic from Arsenal this summer at the latest.

arts.ttl: 'Unfortunately': Stiliyan Petrov shares Aston Villa concern ahead of tomorrow's Champions League clash with Celtic
arts.sum: Aston Villa are gearing up for their final game of the Champions League group stage as they prepare to host Celtic at Villa Park. The...

arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher says Postecoglou had a 'problem' at Celtic that's now resurfacing at Tottenham
arts.sum: Jamie Carragher told Sky Sports that Postecoglou had injury ‘problems’ at Parkhead and now it’s happening again at Tottenham. Jamie Carragher on Ange Postecoglou’s injury ‘problems’ at Celtic and now Tottenham

arts.ttl: Former Celtic man pledges to put ‘difficult months’ behind him at Shamrock Rovers
arts.sum: The 33-year-old has spent the past few months looking for a new club, having made contact with Rovers’ director of football and his former Cardiff teammate Stephen McPhail last summer. Matthews was last with Omonia Nicosia, having signed there in the summer of 2022 under ex-Bhoys boss Neil Lennon on a two-year contract.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa star opens up on injury woes, goal drought and Celtic 'basketball' fears
arts.sum: Jacob Ramsey is hopeful his first goal at Villa Park in over a year will be a springboard for him to rediscover the form he showed in the final two months of the 2022/23 campaign before his injury struggles began. "It was good to get that feeling again because I haven’t scored at Villa Park for a while," Ramsey said.

arts.ttl: What Rennes fans are questioning 24 hours after signing Kyogo Furuhashi from Celtic
arts.sum: There were messages of welcome to the Hoops icon but as the news of the deal has now sunk in, Rennes fans are asking questions of why Kyogo would come to their club. In Kyogo’s first training session with Rennes, one fan said, “He has a smile that’s a pleasure to see.”

arts.ttl: Out of contract Celtic full-back 'agrees transfer to Championship club'
arts.sum: Celtic starlet Josh Dede is reportedly set for a transfer switch to the English Championship.

arts.ttl: Ref & VAR officials confirmed for Aston Villa vs Celtic
arts.sum: Referee & VAR officials confirmed for Aston Villa vs Celtic

arts.ttl: Aston Villa have already made Jhon Duran stance clear amid Chelsea and Arsenal plans
arts.sum: Villa supporters were keen to have rid of Duran when he made an 'irons' gesture over the summer during transfer talks between themselves and West Ham. His rapid start to the Premier League season, with goals mainly coming from the bench, has drawn attention from wider audiences. Earlier this month, Unai Emery commented on the distractions of the January transfer window, stating, "Such circumstances, of course, in this moment are not helping us to be focusing 100%, but Jhon Duran is our player and I am happy with him.

arts.ttl: What we spotted from final Celtic training session before Aston Villa UCL tie as Jota returns - but there's one glaring omission
arts.sum: The Portuguese winger was spotted training with Celts for the first time in two years this morning as he donned the black and green kit alongside his new Celtic teammates and Rodgers with whom he has never worked. At right-back, Ralston has never been considered the most skillful player Celtic have.
